_note: P12.1 team/cultural-consult output. Lives in a subdir so DataRepository (which parses every loose .json directly under data/artifacts/ as fragments or a Master Artifact) does not load it. The ContentManifestValidator reads it by path. Never mark P12.1 [x] from an invented value.
